---
{"dg-publish":true,"permalink":"/admin-tips/","tags":["gardenEntry"],"dg-note-properties":{}}
---


## Studying Material
### Excel
- `categoryName`: module
	- Academic: "CVS"
	- Clinical: "Cardio"
- `tag` (optional): subject
	- Academic: "Anatomy"
	- Clinical: "CBL", "Tutorials"
- `subCategoryName`: lecture/chapter
	- If the main studying content is PowerPoint, I suggest adding per lecture
		- If you have a lecture "Tryptophan and tyrosine metabolism" add as a single entry (if both in the same PowerPoint)
	- If it's a book, I suggest adding by section
		- Two entries: "Tryptophan" and "Tyrosine"
	- If you have two lectures with the same prefix (eg, Errors of refraction I and Error of refraction II), You should merge them into one to avoid confusing the AI labeling algorithm.

> [!caution]- Common Mistakes
> - NOT `category` but `categoryName`
> - NOT `subCategory` but `subCategoryName`
> - NOT `tags` but `tag`

> [!example]-
> ![Screenshot 2026-03-30 at 8.33.33 AM.png](/img/user/attachments/Screenshot%202026-03-30%20at%208.33.33%20AM.png)
> ![Screenshot 2026-03-30 at 8.32.37 AM.png](/img/user/attachments/Screenshot%202026-03-30%20at%208.32.37%20AM.png)
> ![Screenshot 2026-03-30 at 8.35.57 AM.png](/img/user/attachments/Screenshot%202026-03-30%20at%208.35.57%20AM.png)
> 
### Steps
1. Export all subCategories
2. Copy all `subCategoryId`s
3. Create a list of pdf files using `touch` command
4. Rename the original files
5. Bulk upload
## Questions
### Excel
<svg version="1.1" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 742.0671582071199 516.84765625" width="742.0671582071199" height="516.84765625" class="excalidraw-svg"><!-- svg-source:excalidraw stroke="#e03131" stroke-width="2" fill="none"></path></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(320.2265625 157.35546875) rotate(0 8.375 6.638671875)"><path d="M3.32 0 C5.99 0, 8.66 0, 13.43 0 M3.32 0 C5.83 0, 8.33 0, 13.43 0 M13.43 0 C15.64 0, 16.75 1.11, 16.75 3.32 M13.43 0 C15.64 0, 16.75 1.11, 16.75 3.32 M16.75 3.32 C16.75 5.94, 16.75 8.56, 16.75 9.96 M16.75 3.32 C16.75 5.64, 16.75 7.96, 16.75 9.96 M16.75 9.96 C16.75 12.17, 15.64 13.28, 13.43 13.28 M16.75 9.96 C16.75 12.17, 15.64 13.28, 13.43 13.28 M13.43 13.28 C11.37 13.28, 9.3 13.28, 3.32 13.28 M13.43 13.28 C11.06 13.28, 8.68 13.28, 3.32 13.28 M3.32 13.28 C1.11 13.28, 0 12.17, 0 9.96 M3.32 13.28 C1.11 13.28, 0 12.17, 0 9.96 M0 9.96 C0 8.56, 0 7.15, 0 3.32 M0 9.96 C0 7.54, 0 5.11, 0 3.32 M0 3.32 C0 1.11, 1.11 0, 3.32 0 M0 3.32 C0 1.11, 1.11 0, 3.32 0" stroke="#e03131" stroke-width="2" fill="none"></path></g><g stroke-linecap="round"><g transform="translate(176.53125 164.87109375) rotate(0 71.88671875 -0.65234375)"><path d="M0 0 C23.96 -0.22, 119.81 -1.09, 143.77 -1.3 M0 0 C23.96 -0.22, 119.81 -1.09, 143.77 -1.3" stroke="#e03131" stroke-width="2" fill="none"></path></g><g transform="translate(176.53125 164.87109375) rotate(0 71.88671875 -0.65234375)"><path d="M120.36 7.46 C127.96 4.61, 135.57 1.77, 143.77 -1.3 M120.36 7.46 C127.05 4.95, 133.74 2.45, 143.77 -1.3" stroke="#e03131" stroke-width="2" fill="none"></path></g><g transform="translate(176.53125 164.87109375) rotate(0 71.88671875 -0.65234375)"><path d="M120.2 -9.64 C127.86 -6.93, 135.51 -4.23, 143.77 -1.3 M120.2 -9.64 C126.94 -7.26, 133.67 -4.88, 143.77 -1.3" stroke="#e03131" stroke-width="2" fill="none"></path></g></g><mask></mask></svg>
- `Cas`:
	- If two questions has the exactly the same value, they'll be grouped.
	- For matching questions, I use "Match the following" as the `Cas` and I create a question for each option.
- `Tags` and `Year`:
	- The first tag represents the source and can be set from the settings, while the second gives more information.
	- ![[Image of settings\|Image of settings]]
		- Source priority is determined by order.
	- Examples for sources tags and additional ones for each type:
		- `Exams`
			- Additional: "Final/End/Formative/Practical" + YEAR
		- `Department`: official university Q banks
		- `Professor`: PowerPoint questions of a certain professor
			- Additional: Professor name
		- `Guyton`...
	- Merging duplicates rules:
		- All tags will be merged removing duplicates.
		- If `Year` is different than that of the source with the highest priority will be used.
		- If the questions are from the same source, the most recent `Year` will be used.

> [!caution]- Tags vs tagSuggere
> - `Tags` for sources, eg, "Exams, Final 2025"
> - `tagSuggere` for the subjects, it must be identical to the `tag` in [[Admin Tips#Studying Material\|Admin Tips#Studying Material]]

> [!caution]- EXP vs Exp
> - EXP will be the final explanation displayed to user. Use it if you're adding a text book questions that already have explanations (eg, Guyton).
> - Exp will be local to the admin. The AI will use it to generate the explanations.

> [!example]- Clinical Cases Example
> - ![Screenshot 2026-03-30 at 9.50.50 AM.png](/img/user/attachments/Screenshot%202026-03-30%20at%209.50.50%20AM.png)
>	- ![Screenshot 2026-03-30 at 9.49.19 AM.png](/img/user/attachments/Screenshot%202026-03-30%20at%209.49.19%20AM.png)
>	- ![Screenshot 2026-03-30 at 9.49.19 AM 1.png](/img/user/attachments/Screenshot%202026-03-30%20at%209.49.19%20AM%201.png)

> [!example]- Matching Questions Example
> - ![Screenshot 2026-03-30 at 9.59.38 AM.png](/img/user/attachments/Screenshot%202026-03-30%20at%209.59.38%20AM.png)
>- ![Screenshot 2026-03-30 at 10.01.22 AM.png](/img/user/attachments/Screenshot%202026-03-30%20at%2010.01.22%20AM.png)
>	- ![Screenshot 2026-03-30 at 9.59.17 AM.png](/img/user/attachments/Screenshot%202026-03-30%20at%209.59.17%20AM.png)
>	- ![Screenshot 2026-03-30 at 9.59.20 AM.png](/img/user/attachments/Screenshot%202026-03-30%20at%209.59.20%20AM.png)
>	- ![Screenshot 2026-03-30 at 9.59.23 AM.png](/img/user/attachments/Screenshot%202026-03-30%20at%209.59.23%20AM.png)
>	- And so on...
### Steps

> [!caution]- Creating vs. Updating Questions
> - Creating:
> 	- ![Screenshot 2026-03-30 at 10.22.18 AM 1.png](/img/user/attachments/Screenshot%202026-03-30%20at%2010.22.18%20AM%201.png)
> - Updating:
> 	- <svg version="1.1" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 824.302734375 742.4269523279634" width="824.302734375" height="742.4269523279634" class="excalidraw-svg"><!-- height="100%"></image></symbol><style class="style-fonts">      </style></defs><rect x="0" y="0" width="824.302734375" height="742.4269523279634" fill="#ffffff"></rect><g transform="translate(142 10) fill="none"></path></g><g transform="translate(789.953125 171.296875) rotate(0 -66.810546875 0.0859375)"><path d="M-110.14 -8.41 C-119.36 -5.04, -128.57 -1.67, -133.62 0.17 M-110.14 -8.41 C-119.5 1. Download all question files
